operator_tasks.title: Tech debt pass — after TASK-E and TASK-F confirmed done
operator_tasks.manager_instruction: After TASK-E and TASK-F are logged as done in BUILD_LOG.md, do a tech debt pass in src/. Pick at least one: dead code removal, unhandled promise rejections, TypeScript any → proper types, missing auth checks, input validation gaps. Commit, log in BUILD_LOG.md. Do not touch middleware.ts or auth-provider/index.ts exports.
